title: Wenn der Vater mit dem Sohne
writer: Hans Grimm, Gustav Kampendonk, Eckart Hachfeld
actors: Heinz Rühmann, Oliver Grimm, Waltraut Haas
plot: After Clown Teddy lost his son, he lost his gift for laughter. He opened a joke shop and lives above the shop. His landlady has had a foster son since birth, and Teddy decides to raise the child, who always believed that Teddy was...
